message: Capability providers now declare runtime-validated manifests and broker output schemas; AWS and filesystem providers produce policy decisions on effectful execution paths.
resolution: Smoke tests 11 and 15 cover AWS broker policy evidence, provider manifest validation, provider output validation, and denied filesystem writes.

message: Subagent/browser/MCP provider effects are not yet uniformly broker-enforced; subagent writers are isolated, but future provider families still need broker-only execution paths.
resolution: Tracked as remaining R4 work in ai_docs/autonomous_kernel_refactor_audit.md.

message: New event logs include monotonic sequence numbers and hash-chain continuity checks; tampering a chained event causes replay to fail closed.
resolution: Smoke test 17 verifies hash metadata and tamper rejection; smoke test 18 verifies corrupt replay does not silently reconstruct from stale cache.
